title: `ErrOverflow` should be allowed in `DELETE` and `UPDATE` statement if the `sql_mode` is not strict
poc: delete from t where cast(id as unsigned) = 1;
update t set id = '1' where cast(id as unsigned) = 1;
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t (id VARCHAR(255), value INT);
DELETE FROM t WHERE CAST(id AS SIGNED) = 1;
UPDATE t SET value = NULL WHERE CAST(id AS SIGNED) = 1;
